name: avast
description: Avast Ruled as Spyware by FTC

blocks.text: Avast Ruled as Spyware by FTC

Avast was recently [sued by the FTC](https://consumer.ftc.gov/consumer-alerts/2024/02/software-provider-avast-will-pay-165-million-compromising-consumers-privacy) for selling private user data. We recommend removing Avast from your system, as it can now be considered spyware.
